description: Default curriculum extraction schema aligned to the approved NSW sample row shared in chat.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Source URL or source document identifier for the curriculum record.

fields.name: grade_level
fields.description: Broad grade band, such as Primary, Middle, or Senior.

fields.name: display_grade
fields.description: Human-readable grade label shown in the source.

fields.name: grade_number
fields.description: Normalized grade designation from the source.

fields.name: subject
fields.example_value: Personal Development, Health and Physical Education (PDHPE)

fields.name: domain
fields.description: Curriculum domain, strand, or syllabus grouping.
fields.example_value: Community and Family Studies Stage 6 Syllabus (2022)

fields.name: topic
fields.description: Topic or subtopic label if the source identifies one.

fields.name: standard_code
fields.description: Canonical curriculum outcome or standard code.

fields.name: display_standard_code
fields.description: Display-ready standard code as shown to users in the source.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Descriptive text for the standard, outcome, or curriculum statement.
fields.example_value: describes the contribution an individual's experiences, values, attitudes and beliefs make to the development of goals

fields.name: czi_standard_code
fields.description: Optional mapped CZI standard code when available.

sample_contract.subject_naming: Preserve the full official subject name exactly as shown in the sample, including parenthetical abbreviations when they appear.
sample_contract.grade_level_naming: Use the sample's broad grade-level labels, such as: Senior.
sample_contract.display_grade_logic: Render display_grade in the same user-facing style as the sample, such as: Year 12.
sample_contract.grade_string_logic: The sample does not define a separate grade_string column. Use the sample's grade representation through the existing grade_number/display_grade fields, such as: Year 12. Do not invent extra grade fields.
sample_contract.display_standard_code_logic: Display standard code may either mirror the source notation or be synthetic/transformed. Match the sample's display style for this run (for example: P1.1), rather than assuming it must equal the raw source text.
sample_contract.source_link_format: Use a direct absolute source URL in the source column. Preserve the canonical document or page link format shown in the sample, such as: https://www.nsw.gov.au/education-and-training/nesa/curriculum/pdhpe/cafs-stage-6-2022.
sample_contract.description_style: Use outcome-style prose rather than notes or commentary. keep the wording in sentence-fragment style starting with lowercase when the source does so. omit a trailing period unless the source clearly includes one.
description_integrity_rules: Do not merge text from neighboring rows into the description.
Do not drop required sub-parts that belong to the same description entry.
Do not add stray headers, footers, notes, or layout labels into description.
sample_contract.description_multiline_style: The sample uses a single-cell prose style for description. Do not force multiline formatting unless the approved sample for the run explicitly preserves it.
sample_contract.description_merge_split_style: The sample indicates merged prose descriptions. Merge same-row sub-parts into one description only when they belong to the same source entry and without crossing row boundaries.
sample_contract.bullet_and_punctuation_style: Do not prefix values with bullets or numbering. Preserve source punctuation only when it belongs to the content.
symbol_preservation_rules: Preserve mathematical symbols, equations, radicals, superscripts, and subscripts when represented in the source.
Preserve chemistry notation, Greek letters, domain-specific notation, and punctuation with semantic value.
Preserve non-Latin scripts and mixed-language content without flattening them into incorrect plain text.
If native extraction degrades special notation, attempt localized repair from surrounding context and the source evidence before returning the value.
If notation cannot be repaired confidently, leave the value blank or send the row to manual review rather than inventing plain-text substitutes.

field_placement_rules.domain: Use Domain for the named syllabus, strand, domain, or official grouping above the standard level.
field_placement_rules.topic: Use Topic only for a true topic/subtopic label. Leave it blank when the source does not expose one.
field_placement_rules.l3: Use L3 only for a genuine third hierarchy level from the source. Do not copy description text into L3.
field_placement_rules.l4: Use L4 only for a genuine fourth hierarchy level from the source. Otherwise leave it blank.
field_placement_rules.l5: Use L5 only for a genuine fifth hierarchy level from the source. Otherwise leave it blank.
field_placement_rules.description: Use description for the actual learning outcome, standard statement, or descriptive sentence. Do not place hierarchy labels, page headers, or bullet markers in description.

disallowed_output_content: Do not include commentary, analysis notes, or explanations in output cells.
Do not copy raw HTML, navigation labels, page numbers, or file names into output cells.
Do not place citation text inside the value columns; citations belong only in the paired _source_citation columns.
Do not merge multiple standards or outcomes into one row unless the sample CSV clearly does so.
Do not force text into Topic/L3/L4/L5 when the source does not provide those hierarchy levels.
Do not prepend bullets, numbering, or labels like 'Description:' to description values.
noise_rejection_rules: Exclude appendix-only items when they are outside the requested extraction scope.
Exclude notes such as 'N.B.' unless the sample or instructions explicitly require them.
Exclude repeated headers, repeated footers, page numbers, and continuation fragments from adjacent rows.
Exclude source layout labels, technical extraction artifacts, and non-row structural text.
Reject description values contaminated by neighboring row text or document chrome.

sample_rows.Subject: Personal Development, Health and Physical Education (PDHPE)
sample_rows.Domain: Community and Family Studies Stage 6 Syllabus (2022)
sample_rows.description: describes the contribution an individual's experiences, values, attitudes and beliefs make to the development of goals
